sglang.title: Add Cohere Command R chat template
sglang.author: noah-kim-theori
sglang.bodyExcerpt: I add cohere command-r style chat template. Without chat template, model cannot properly stop the conversation with EOS token.

vllm.title: [Build/CI] Fixing 'docker run' to re-enable AMD CI tests.
vllm.author: Alexei-V-Ivanov-AMD

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fixed error in slice_lora_b for MergedQKVParallelLinearWithLora
vllm.author: FurtherAI
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #3524
Fix #4605
MergedQKVParallelLinearWithLora  slice_lora_b throws an error when the passed in lora_b contains None.

vllm.title: [Core][Optimization] change copy-on-write from dict[int, list] to list
vllm.author: youkaichao

vllm.title: [Bug fix][Core] fixup ngram not setup correctly
vllm.author: leiwen83
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
ngram_prompt_lookup_max/ngram_prompt_lookup_min need to be past through SpecDecodeWorker.create_worker's draft_worker_kwargs.
If those two doesn't get past, now there will be exception as dict cannot pop those two keys.

vllm.title: [Core][Distributed] support both cpu and device tensor in broadcast tensor dict
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Prior to this PR, broadcast_tensor_dict can only work for cuda tensor.
This PR enables both cuda tensor and cpu tensor for broadcast_tensor_dict.
It will be useful when we have some metadata in cpu tensor, e.g. blocks_to_swap_in and blocks_to_swap_out to be introduced in #4659 .
Note: blocks_to_copy
